title: 有馬記念の後に・見渡せば

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature wins the Arima Kinen and attributes
her success in the tough race to the support of
her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then tries to ask Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro
Ryan the secret to becoming even stronger than
she is now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two promise to answer this question properly
at a later time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Showing signs of new growth, Nice Nature aims
for her next goal—the Takarazuka Kinen.
